raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to click on the "Profile" link in the dropdown menu.
Looking at the screenshot, the "Profile" link is within a cyan-bordered box.
The text "Profile" is located approximately in the upper part of this cyan box.

Let's estimate the coordinates for "Profile":
The cyan box is centered horizontally and vertically.
The cyan box seems to span from about x=372 to x=628 and y=463 to y=659.
The "Profile" link is the first item in this box.
The "Profile" text is at approximately (500, 495).

Let's refine the coordinates:
Center of the cyan box: (500, 561)
Height of the cyan box: 659 - 463 = 196
Width of the cyan box: 628 - 372 = 256
The "Profile" row seems to be roughly the top third of the box.
The "Profile" text itself is around x=500, y=494.

Let's try (500, 494).
